segment.source: Renders an optional heading above a two- or three-column card grid; each card has an optional title (linked when a link is set), rich-text body and a Read-more arrow link. Use it for: service listings, offering overviews, related-topic teasers, program summaries — sets of short titled text blocks with optional targets. Prefer '3-Column Feature Grid' for icon-led features, 'Article Grid' for blog posts, 'Content Columns' for flowing text without cards.
